description_long: This object is a classic martini glass, featuring a wide, conical bowl that tapers smoothly to a slender stem and a flat, circular base. The bowl is broad and shallow, designed to hold a small volume of liquid, and its sharp V-shape is iconic for serving cocktails such as martinis. The stem is long and thin, allowing the drinker to hold the glass without warming the contents with their hand. The base is circular and proportionate to the bowl, providing stability when placed on flat surfaces. The entire object appears to be made of a dark, glossy material, likely tinted glass, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. There are no visible decorations, garnishes, or accessories such as straws or umbrellas, and the liquid inside is dark and opaque.
description: A sleek, dark martini glass with a wide conical bowl, slender stem, and flat circular base, filled with an opaque liquid.
description_view_0: Front view of a martini glass showing the full conical bowl, slender stem, and circular base.
description_view_1: Side view of the martini glass, nearly identical to the front, with the bowl and stem clearly visible.
description_view_2: Another side view, mirroring the previous angles, highlighting the symmetry of the bowl and stem.
description_view_3: Rear view of the martini glass, showing the same conical bowl and base, with no visible differences from the front.
